key_findings: BEAUTY_PERSONAL_CARE × Evergreen (n=885, eng=43%): → other + warm_studio + lifestyle_integrated
BEAUTY_PERSONAL_CARE × Ramadan (n=95, eng=73%): → other + warm_studio + lifestyle_integrated
F_AND_B × Evergreen (n=2028, eng=44%): → retail_urban + studio + multi_product
F_AND_B × Ramadan (n=193, eng=36%): → retail_store + dramatic_moody + editorial
HEALTHCARE_WELLNESS × Evergreen (n=353, eng=32%): → other + warm_studio + product_hero_closeup
HEALTHCARE_WELLNESS × Ramadan (n=7, eng=42%): → studio + natural + lifestyle_integrated
REAL_ESTATE × Evergreen (n=154, eng=22%): → other + natural + lifestyle_integrated
REAL_ESTATE × Ramadan (n=5, eng=0%): → outdoor + natural + lifestyle_integrated
RETAIL_LIFESTYLE × Evergreen (n=864, eng=25%): → home_domestic + natural_daylight + text_dominant
RETAIL_LIFESTYLE × Eid Al Fitr (n=61, eng=42%): → other + warm_studio + lifestyle_integrated
FASHION × Evergreen (n=1196, eng=67%): → restaurant + dramatic_moody + editorial
FASHION × Eid Al Fitr (n=63, eng=58%): → studio + warm_studio + text_dominant
Best setting: 'retail_urban' (100%) → natural_daylight light + product_hero_closeup frame
how_to_use: Step 1: client sector + content occasion → look up sector_occasion_decision_tree → get recommended_production (setting, lighting, composition, register, tone). Step 2: confirm with setting_guide — use best_lighting and best_composition for that setting. Step 3: cross-check lighting_composition_guide to ensure lighting+framing alignment.
